/usr/bin/ar qc libprojectforge_business.a CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/AccessChecker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/AddressDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/AdminService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/AuftragDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/BaseDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/BookDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/BusinessServicesExpanded.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/BusinessSvcs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/CalendarDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/ConfigurationDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/DatevDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/EmailService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/GanttDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/GroupDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/HrDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/JobService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/KontoDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/KostDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/LdapService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/LoginService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/PollService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/RechnungDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/ScriptingService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/TaskDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/TeamCalendarDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/TimesheetDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/UserDao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_business.dir/src/VacationDao.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libprojectforge_business.a
